title: Create: Harmonics
description: Reproduce audio in a Create manner!
body:
![Create: Harmonics banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99a0474465c8a86297f7d97cf133ea380eff5858.png)
# Welcome to Create: Harmonics This mod lets you play sounds from the internet in Minecraft using _Create_ mechanics. Get **Ethereal Records**, special records which hold links that can be assigned using a **Record press base**, and put them in the mod's jukeboxes to have them play whatever you like! Playback is fully compatible with contraptions, so you can play music on elevators, add ambient sounds to your factories or add cool engine sounds to your trains (working perfectly with speed-based pitch control). The environment also affects the audio, muffling the sound when the speaker is submerged or reverberating when a special structure is built around it! You can explore all the features of this addon on this [wiki](https://github.com/bitmochibit/createharmonics/wiki) or through **Ponder**! Fully compatible with **Sable** and **Valkyrien Skies**. ## Planned features 🎯 * A lot more record types with unique audio effects * Programmable Ethereal Record, with custom audio effects * Brass jukebox, with configurable pitch, range and record collections * Speakers and audio routing systems * Support to local files upload * Mob interactions with sound ## How it works 🌐 This mod uses **ffprobe** and **yt-dlp** to retrieve metadata from the source, while **ffmpeg** builds the audio stream directly for Minecraft's sound system. *This addon is natively compatible natively with other audio processing mods, such as [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)* > **Note** > To remain compliant with the ToS of most online services, the server does not stream the audio; it only _synchronizes_ the playback on each client. This makes the mod both multiplayer-friendly and legally safe. ## External Library Notice ⚠️ Since external binaries are required to handle online sources, the mod features an embedded tool that can **automatically download** them for you from trusted sources. You can easily opt out of this behavior. _For manual installations_, a comprehensive markdown guide will be generated with recommended download links and installation steps. Once installed, the tool can verify your setup instantly, without game restarts. **Only TRUST official releases of this mod!** This is extremely important. If you have any doubts regarding the authenticity of a release, feel free to contact me directly on Discord. ## Credits 💕 Check [here](https://github.com/bitmochibit/createharmonics?tab=readme-ov-file#credits) all the credits! ## Support the development 🤝 If you want to support the development of this mod, you can do it by: * Sharing the mod with your friends * Reporting issues and suggesting features on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/bitmochibit/createharmonics/issues) and [contributing code](https://github.com/bitmochibit/createharmonics/pulls) * Contributing [financially](https://ko-fi.com/mochibit) ## Legal stuff 📜 This mod is not affiliated with music platform and does not host any audio content. Please respect the terms of service of the platforms you use to get audio from. I do not condone unauthorized distribution of copyrighted material, nor I am responsible for any misuse of this mod. This mod is provided as-is, without any warranties or guarantees of any kind. By using this mod, you agree to use it responsibly and respect the rights of content creators.
